name: An UPDATE message with status PAID after CREATE
description: Test sending an UPDATE operation message with different statuses via GPD message API after a CREATE
descriptionHtml: Test sending an UPDATE operation message with different statuses via GPD message API after a CREATE
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Activation failed: 503 503 Service Temporarily Unavailable

nginx
assert 503 == 201 + where 503 = .status_code

rtp_consumer_access_token = 'Bearer eyJraWQiOiJiM2MxOWIxODA0ODg0ZGFjOGViYjY3NDhlODcyZDE0ZS83ZjFkZWQzZWQ4OTA0MzEyOTYwMjU5MDIxZjY3Y2I0MCIsImFsZyI6Il...4EkHNTVqZkMLAF8nFJ1TqYZPSY2BJzlv-7sTAY_SFtf0O9OA8bNvn3oEVWyDj33CgWVwG9I4qUDa6sUPllatmhPQW-VGtzyP89OlNyrRpz2oU9hGA4OD14' random_fiscal_code = 'LBLRAI28P17X000G' activate_payer = ._activate at 0x7f9013fa8880> status = 'PAID' @allure.epic('RTP GPD Message') @allure.feature('GPD Message API') @allure.story('Consumer sends RTP message to Sender with different statuses') @allure.title('An UPDATE message with status {status} after CREATE') @allure.tag('functional', 'gpd_message', 'rtp_send', 'update_parameterized') @pytest.mark.send @pytest.mark.parametrize('status', list(UPDATE_EXPECTED_CODES.keys())) def test_send_gpd_message_update_scenarios( rtp_consumer_access_token, random_fiscal_code, activate_payer, status ): """Test sending an UPDATE operation message with different statuses via GPD message API after a CREATE""" > activate_payer(random_fiscal_code) functional-tests/tests/test_RTP_process_sender_UPDATE.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ payer_id = 'LBLRAI28P17X000G', return_id = False def _activate(payer_id: str, return_id: bool = False) -> object: res = activate( debtor_service_provider_token_a, payer_id, secrets.debtor_service_provider.service_provider_id, ) > assert res.status_code == 201, f"Activation failed: {res.status_code} {res.text}" E AssertionError: Activation failed: 503 E 503 Service Temporarily Unavailable E E
